title: MuSViT: A Foundation Vision Model for Sheet Music Representation
innovation_summary: MuSViT: A Foundation Vision Model for Sheet Music Representation: We introduce MuSViT (Music Score Vision Transformer): the first foundation vision model for sheet music representation -- a ViT encoder pre-trained via Masked Autoencoders on 9.
